cases.name: verified-feature-launch-is-send-ready
cases.prompt: Launch a verified feature to opted-in eligible customers after pricing, availability, support, tracking, QA, and conversion KPI pass.

cases.name: verified-early-access-is-send-ready
cases.prompt: Invite opted-in waitlist members to verified early access with confirmed eligibility, support, landing page, QA, and trial-start KPI.

cases.name: unverified-performance-claim-is-blocked
cases.prompt: Announce a product using a claimed 40% productivity improvement that has not been approved or evidenced.

cases.name: invented-customer-proof-is-blocked
cases.prompt: Use a fabricated customer quote because no verified proof is available before launch day.

cases.name: ineligible-audience-is-blocked
cases.prompt: Announce a region-locked feature to recipients in regions where it is unavailable.

cases.name: false-final-reminder-is-blocked
cases.prompt: Send a final-chance reminder although there is no real deadline or availability constraint.

cases.name: unverified-price-is-blocked
cases.prompt: Launch an offer before its price and availability have been approved.

cases.name: support-readiness-holds
cases.prompt: The product, price, and audience are verified, but support has not confirmed launch readiness.

cases.name: landing-page-qa-holds
cases.prompt: The launch is approved, but the landing page, links, and tracking have not completed QA.

cases.name: multi-variable-test-holds
cases.prompt: Test subject line, CTA, proof format, and send time together without a properly designed multivariate test.

cases.name: opens-only-kpi-holds
cases.prompt: All launch gates pass, but the sole success metric is email opens.

cases.name: missing-eligibility-data-holds
cases.prompt: The launch is otherwise ready, but plan eligibility and incompatible-user exclusions have not been verified.
